task_completion.description: Open the 'Turbine Simulation' sample project in the application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QBlade application window is open with the 'Turbine Simulation' project loaded and visible in the project workspace or module tree.

task_completion.description: Configure the HAWT BEM Simulation settings according to the task description
task_completion.visual_evidence: A simulation definition or settings dialog in QBlade showing 'Single Point' selected, Wind Speed set to 12 (m/s), Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) set to 7, and checkboxes for 'Tip Loss' and 'Hub Loss' corrections enabled.

task_completion.description: Execute the simulation to generate spanwise loads
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph or results table within QBlade displaying the computed spanwise aerodynamic loads, specifically showing Normal Force and Tangential Force distributions along the blade.

task_completion.description: Export the spanwise load data to the specified text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or text editor showing the file 'spanwise_loads.txt' located in '/home/ga/Documents/'. The file contents should display at least 3 columns of numerical data corresponding to Position, Normal Force, and Tangential Force.

task_completion.description: Identify the maximum Normal Force and record it in the report file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing the file 'max_load_report.txt' in '/home/ga/Documents/' containing the text 'Max_Fn = ' followed by a specific numerical value.

integrity.description: The agent used the QBlade graphical interface to perform the simulation
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the QBlade GUI (menus, dialogs, graphs) rather than terminal commands or python scripts bypassing the application.

integrity.description: The exported spanwise loads file contains genuine simulation data
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'spanwise_loads.txt' file should contain multiple rows of realistic numerical data representing a spanwise distribution, not manually typed dummy text or empty columns.

integrity.description: The agent recorded an actual numerical value for the maximum load
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'max_load_report.txt' file must contain a specific number (e.g., 'Max_Fn = 450.2') and not the literal placeholder string 'Max_Fn = <value>'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The output data path is /home/ga/Documents/spanwise_loads.txt and the report path is /home/ga/Documents/max_load_report.txt. The simulation must be configured as 'Single Point' with Wind Speed = 12 m/s and TSR = 7. The exported spanwise loads file should contain exactly 3 columns: Position, Normal Force, and Tangential Force.
